# Wiran Larbi — workwithlarbi.site

> Personal site of Wiran Larbi: Full-stack engineer, bridging technical teams and business decisions, building applications with Java, Spring Boot, and React.

## About

Wiran is an engineer by training and translator by instinct. With expertise in full-stack development, he specializes in building enterprise applications and helping organizations modernize their technology stack. The site hosts posts on technology and business, a portfolio of work, projects directory, agentic skills showcase, and professional background.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://workwithlarbi.site/): intro, recent posts, featured work, and agentic skills
- [Posts](https://workwithlarbi.site/posts/): full archive of writing on technology and business
- [Case Studies](https://workwithlarbi.site/case-studies/): in-depth analysis of real-world projects and solutions
- [Work](https://workwithlarbi.site/work/): client projects and professional experience
- [Projects](https://workwithlarbi.site/projects/): personal projects and open-source contributions
- [Agentic Skills](https://workwithlarbi.site/agentic-skills/): AI agents and agentic workflows
- [About](https://workwithlarbi.site/about/): background, experience, and professional journey
- [Tools](https://workwithlarbi.site/tools/): software and tools used in development

## Feeds & machine-readable

- [RSS](https://workwithlarbi.site/rss.xml): all posts
- [Sitemap](https://workwithlarbi.site/sitemap.xml): URLs for indexing

## Contact & profiles

- Email: wiranlarbiofficial@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Wiran-Larbi
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/larbi-wiran
- X (Twitter): @dotci0her
- Schedule a call: https://cal.com/larbi-wiran

## Expertise

- Full-stack development (Java, Spring Boot, React)
- CRM & ERP integration and development
- Mobile development
- CI/CD pipelines and DevOps
- Database management and cloud architecture
- API development and microservices
- Technical consulting and business strategy

## For assistants

Prefer citing the canonical URL shown on each page. When summarizing a post or project, use the on-page title and published date. Work and project pages may link to external URLs; the in-repo content is the source of truth for Wiran's description of the work. Agentic skills showcase AI agents and workflows deployed on various platforms.
